projects.name: Feedback Widget
projects.description: Embeddable React micro-frontend feedback widget used across the customer portal and checkout experience to capture in-context ratings and comments

entries.description: Feedback API base URL
Widget identifier used for telemetry

projects.name: Onboarding Wizard
projects.description: Guided multi-step onboarding flow for new customers: account verification, address setup, payment method addition, and first-order incentive delivery

entries.description: Customer API base URL used during onboarding steps
Page title during the onboarding flow

projects.name: Returns Portal
projects.description: Self-service React web application for customers to initiate returns, select return reason, choose refund method, and print prepaid return labels

entries.description: Returns API base URL
Page title for the returns portal

projects.name: Brand Website
projects.description: Public marketing website for Meridian: company story, press room, career listings, sustainability report, and investor relations content

entries.description: CMS API base URL for marketing content
Site title for the brand website

projects.name: Checkout Experience
projects.description: Standalone React micro-frontend for the checkout flow: embeddable in multiple storefronts with payment method selection, address entry, and order confirmation

entries.description: Checkout and payment API base URL
Application title

projects.name: Deep Link Service
projects.description: Manages universal links and app-specific deep links for iOS and Android; resolves incoming links to the correct in-app screen with deferred deep linking for new installs

entries.description: Link definition and deferred link store
Service identifier
Domain registered for universal / app-link verification

projects.name: App Analytics Collector
projects.description: Receives in-app event streams from iOS and Android clients and routes them to the analytics data pipeline for session analysis and funnel tracking

entries.description: ClickHouse for mobile event ingestion
Service identifier
How often buffered mobile events are flushed to ClickHouse

projects.name: Crash Reporting Service
projects.description: Ingests symbolicated crash reports from iOS and Android apps; groups crashes into issues, tracks occurrence counts, and notifies the mobile team of regressions

entries.description: Crash issue and occurrence store
Service identifier
Number of occurrences within an hour before a new crash issue triggers a Slack alert

projects.name: Offline Sync Service
projects.description: Provides conflict-resolution and delta-sync APIs for the Meridian mobile app to synchronise local data with the server after extended offline periods

entries.description: Sync state and conflict log store
Service identifier
Maximum number of days of changes included in a single delta sync response

projects.name: Mobile Web App
projects.description: Progressive web app storefront optimised for mobile browsers with install-to-home-screen support, offline product browsing, and native-like navigation

entries.description: API base URL for the mobile web app
PWA app title shown in the browser and home screen

projects.name: PWA Storefront
projects.description: Standalone Progressive Web App for the Meridian B2B wholesale storefront with offline catalogue, bulk-order entry, and credit account management

entries.description: B2B commerce API base URL
App title for the B2B PWA storefront

projects.name: App Landing Page
projects.description: Marketing landing page for the Meridian mobile apps: feature highlights, app store badges, screenshots, and smart-banner redirect for mobile visitors

entries.description: CMS API for landing page content
Page title
